text: DataSync Components @ mosmantio @ s e Task - A‘job’ within DataSync, defines what is being synced, how quickly, FROM where and TO where e Agent - Software used to read or write to on- premises data stores using NFS or SMB * Location - every task has two locations FROM and TO. E.g. Network File System (NFS), Server Message Block (SMB), Amazon EFS, Amazon FSx and Amazon S3
